meta.title: Octiware: Choose Your Experience
meta.description: Octiware is home to Rust to Hearth, an indie game studio, and Octiware PC, a custom PC builder.

game.title: Rust to Hearth
game.description: An indie RPG studio crafting immersive worlds, handwritten stories, and games that stick with you long after you've stopped playing.

pc.title: Octiware PC
pc.description: Handcrafted custom PCs built to order. Direct-die cooling, custom water loops, and expert overclocking. Built by enthusiasts, for enthusiasts.
